title: Production Supervisor
description:
We are a global leader in secure and sustainable technology lifecycle management services.


Job Responsibilities

  • Supervise Production Operators and manufacturing activities in Battery Recycling Plant pertaining to the production of products and/or manufacturing processes across production area such as Battery Feeding Area, Mechanical Plant Area, Chemical Plant Area and Mechanical Vapor Recompression Area.
  • Conduct performance reviews, including resolving performance issues, discipline issue, time management and commitment of Production Operators.
  • Establish the scheduling of production route sheet and team performance metrics, including monitoring output and adjusting schedules to ensure production targets are achieved.
  • Accountable for productivity, quality, and training metrics of operators, and provide regular progress reports and manufacturing metrics to management and cross-functional stakeholders, including developing resolutions as needed to improve metrics achievement.
  • Lead Production CIP (continuous improvement program), partner with engineering on investigations and/or corrective actions, perform non-conformance investigations for review with engineering, assures documentation content is valid.
  • Accountable to ensure staff is appropriately trained to perform assigned work according to production WI.
  • Monitor raw material usage and availability required in daily production, including proposing resolutions to mediate shortages.
  • Manage material and labor variances to meet established standards, including proposing resolutions to mediate shortfalls.
  • Responsible for production machinery basic maintenance, maximise production output, machinery up time and monitor equipment performance with data recordings and production check list/route sheet/material transfer form/preventive maintenance records.
  • Responsible for Production floor cleanliness and safety, perform 5S and housekeeping check in daily basis.
  • Working with engineers to improve process efficiency and stability.
  • Co-ordinate with maintenance team to drive TPM (Total Productive Maintenance) system.
  • Update monthly KPIs and present to management.
  • Update skills matrix and machine utilisation for capacity planning.

Job Requirements

  • Sec/Diploma/Degree
  • Simple computer skills
  • Experience in handling chemical, machines and equipment
  • Experience in leading a team of workers / operators
  • Willing to work OT or weekends based on operational needs and in accordance with MOM regulations
  • Prior work experience related to manufacturing or heavy industry
  • Comfortable working in a fast-paced, non-air-conditioned environment in accordance with WSH standards
  • Good communication and reporting attributes.
  • Good time management and discipline

We regret to inform you that due to the high volume of applications received, only candidates who are shortlisted for the next stage of the selection process will be contacted. We appreciate your understanding and thank you for your interest in this opportunity.

postedCompany.description:
Since our formation in 2005, TES has been a global leader in providing IT Lifecycle Services, offering bespoke solutions that help customers manage the commissioning, deployment and retirement of Information Technology (IT) assets.  We understand the common challenges faced when managing IT equipment throughout its lifecycle, providing cost effective solutions whilst achieving compliance with all local and international data security, environmental, and industry regulations.

A new facility for recycling lithium-ion batteries found in mobile phones and electrical vehicles is set to open in Feb 2020.  It will recycle 14 tonnes of lithium-ion batteries or equivalent of 280,000 smartphones batteries each day.
postedCompany.name: TES B PTE. LTD.
